known_issues: App broken after version 18 deployment; user requested full rollback to version 5

existing_features.title: Restore all frontend files to their exact Version 5 state. This includes: App.tsx (routes and providers), all pages (LandingPage, Dashboard, CreateInvitationWizard, InvitationEditor, GuestInvitation, NotFound), all components (AuthGuard, Header, wizard steps, guest components, media, templates, events, layout), all hooks (useQueries.ts), context (InvitationFormContext.tsx), utils, and stylesheets. Revert any login-gating removal, anonymous actor changes, or any other modifications made after Version 5. The app must look and behave exactly as it did in Version 5.

new_feature_requests.summary: Restore the backend (backend/main.mo) to its exact Version 5 state, including all data types (Invitation, Event, RSVP, Photo, Music), CRUD operations, blob storage, and access control logic that were present in Version 5. Undo all backend changes introduced after Version 5.
